title: ANOTHER evangelion release
wikitext:
[]: ANOTHER evangelion release....             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Sep 05, 2006 1:32 pm [URL=http://www.amazon.co.uk/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Premium-Collection/dp/B000HOJEWY/sr=1-2/qid=1157480571/ref=pd_bowtega_2/026-3613440-1689214?ie=UTF8&s=dvd]Lookit.[/URL] right. now this is something i need clearing up before i get onto amazon.co.uk and get them to send me the 10th an. boxed set: are the link above and THAT set the same? a stupidly small amount of info is on show on both regions' sites and if anyone can let me know i'd be GREATFUL BEYOND BELIEF. now that the words full of capitals are gone; writhe in my thread of the pennieless otaku. a.k.a. bitch about yet another release.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Sep 05, 2006 2:11 pm This isn't the same as the 10th Anniversary Set from what I can tell. It looks like its just a boxset of the Platinum DVDs released in the UK. Thats just a guess though, I havn't heard anything about it either as you said theres hardly any information at all. If you want the 10th Anniversary Set you might just be better off importing it from the states like I am. It's only costing me about Â£95 for the set from amazon.com

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Sep 05, 2006 3:56 pm Now if Amazon could have actually shipped the 10th Anniversary set out when they said they were going to :?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Sep 06, 2006 9:17 am awwwwww, ACE!! i never realised you could use the same account on any amazon site you wanted. looks like i don't have to nag .co.uk to get the set sent to me i'm extremely happy now as for the set i linked to.....yeah, looks like it is just all the platinums gathered together *sigh* another waste of money i'll have to circum to ; _ ;

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Sep 07, 2006 7:11 am Nice looking! That metallic cover really is something! I guess it's all the platinum gathered too, since it says that contains 7 dvds! Another pre-order just placed!

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Tue Oct 10, 2006 1:36 am cool, a badass tin.

[]: Re: ANOTHER evangelion release....             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Tue Oct 10, 2006 8:06 pm ice reaper wrote: LOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOONG link revised. ^^

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Tue Oct 10, 2006 11:04 pm Wait, so why is the Final Fantasy VII Official Guide the 'perfect partner' to an evangelion box set?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Oct 10, 2006 11:47 pm ThroneofDravaris wrote: Wait, so why is the Final Fantasy VII Official Guide the 'perfect partner' to an evangelion box set?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 11, 2006 6:57 pm cat42 wrote: ThroneofDravaris wrote: Wait, so why is the Final Fantasy VII Official Guide the 'perfect partner' to an evangelion box set?

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sat Oct 14, 2006 6:38 am Yeah, this is just not going to end...ever!!
